aeo_readiness.summary: Jump HVAC has basic AEO elements in place, such as a clear service structure and contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO optimization.
quick_wins: Generate and display customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific keywords, and a blog with relevant HVAC topics.
Implement a clear call-to-action on the homepage to guide users towards contacting or scheduling services.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic contact information (phone number and email) but lacks a detailed Google Business Profile (GBP) listing.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP listing is a significant gap. A GBP is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of structured data for local business information.

nap_citations.summary: The website displays the business name, address, and phone number (NAP), but these need to be consistent across all platforms and directories.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across the website, social media, and all online directories.
List the business in local directories and citation sites such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local Chamber of Commerce websites.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of local SEO optimization and GBP listing.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services in Lakewood, CO.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP listing and ensuring NAP consistency.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publishing high-quality, location-specific content and earning backlinks from local businesses and organizations.

page_title: Top HVAC Service in Lakewood, CO | Jump HVAC
